EnterpriseSDK
Table of Contents

Interface IBuilderItem3

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.DatasourcesRaster
Assembly
ESRI.Server.DatasourcesRaster.dll

Provides access to members that control a builder item.

[Guid("E0E41C47-72EC-4E66-8D6C-C6A90F6D1C21")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface IBuilderItem3 : IBuilderItem2, IBuilderItem

Properties

AuxiliaryFieldValues

The field values corresponding to the AuxiliaryFields of the parent raster builder described by a property set that maps field names to fields values. These values take precedence over metadata from the BuilderItem's function raster dataset.

IPropertySet AuxiliaryFieldValues { get; set; }

Property Value

IPropertySet
